acquisition method: The Orbitrap Fusion LUMOS mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) and positive ionization mode.
cleavage agent: Proteins were digested with chymotrypsin and measured on a high mass accuracy and high-resolution mass spectrometer.
collision energy: Peptide fragmentation was performed using higher energy collision-induced dissociation (HCD) and a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30%.
fragmentation method: Peptide fragmentation was performed using higher energy collision-induced dissociation (HCD) and a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30%.
instrument: the Orbitrap Fusion LUMOS mass spectrometer (ThermoFisher Scientific, USA).
ionization type: The Orbitrap Fusion LUMOS mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) and positive ionization mode.
reduction concentration: Cysteine residues were reduced (10 mM dithiothreitol).
